name: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
description: Focuses on core AI methodologies, deep neural networks, natural language processing, cognitive robotics, and computer vision. Strong research programs in health informatics and autonomous navigation.
programs: PhD in AI and Machine Learning

name: Computer Science and Engineering
description: Covers theoretical computer science, computer networks, algorithms, databases, cybersecurity, and cloud computing. The department features active research publications and robust placement records.
building: Department of Computer Science and Engineering Building
programs: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

name: Information Technology
description: Focuses on software engineering, web technologies, database management systems, data science, and cloud system administration. Research areas include internet of things (IoT) and big data analysis.
building: Department of Computer Science and Engineering Building, West Wing
programs: PhD in IT and Software Engineering

name: Electronics and Communication Engineering
description: Engages in microelectronics, semiconductor devices, VLSI systems, wireless communication, microwave engineering, and signal processing research. Collaborates with space agencies and defense labs.
programs: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering

name: Electrical Engineering
description: Focuses on power electronics, electrical machines, smart grids, control engineering, and renewable energy integration. Active research in electric vehicle drivetrains and power quality analysis.
programs: B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering

name: Mechanical Engineering
description: Conducts training in fluid dynamics, solid mechanics, thermal engineering, thermodynamics, robotics, and product CAD design. High student participation in FSAE automotive competitions.
building: Mechanical Engineering Block, southern campus area
programs: M.Tech in Design of Mechanical Systems

name: Civil Engineering
description: Focuses on structural engineering, environmental engineering, soil mechanics, GIS and remote sensing, and transportation systems. Serves regional state departments for consultation.
building: Civil Engineering Block, adjacent to the workshops

name: Biotechnology
description: Integrates biology and engineering, working on biosensors, plant tissue culture, molecular genetics, bioinformatics, bioreactor modeling, and drug design studies.
building: Research and Innovation Center, South Wing

name: Chemical Engineering
description: Specializes in reaction engineering, transport phenomena, chemical process simulations, petroleum refining, and polymer science. Active in green fuel and recycling research.
programs: PhD in Chemical Sciences and Processing

name: Management Studies
description: Delivers business management concepts, marketing strategies, financial analytics, operations research, organizational behavior, and entrepreneurship skills training.
building: MBA Block, behind the Central Library
